Fill "b18 5ap" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Enter postcode to start your' })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'badge Priority from O2 Bundle 2 £65.36 £29.99  icon 2x Large Pizzas icon 1x' })
Add Stuffed Crust to first pizza
Add Stuffed Crust to second pizza

steps.name: Verify if the stuffed crust has been added on second pizza

labels.name: titlePath
labels.value: > chromium > Deals.spec.ts > PJ Website Automated tests - Deals

description: If user added Stuffed Crust to the pizza using a pop up, they will see the pop up again when adding another pizza to the deal
